I first want to thank my supervisor, Dr. Stephen Chan for his guidance, support, and encouragement throughout the research project. His expertise and insights have been invaluable in shaping the direction of this work. He was always available to provide feedback and guidance, and his mentorship has been instrumental in my growth as a researcher. 

Secondly, I would like to thank the University of Gibraltar for providing me with the opportunity to conduct this research project. The resources and support provided by the university have been essential in enabling me to carry out this work.
